data.title: Binance Futures to Launch SOMIUSDT Perpetual Contract with 5x Leverage
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform is set to introduce SOMIUSDT perpetual contract pre-market trading on Binance Futures starting 2025-08-25 at 09:30 (UTC). This new offering will allow users to trade with up to 5x leverage, expanding the range of trading options available. The underlying asset for this contract is Somnia (SOMI), a high-performance EVM-compatible L1 blockchain focused on mass consumer applications such as games and entertainment products. The total supply of SOMI is 1,000,000,000, and the settlement asset for the contract is USDT.

The mark price during the pre-market trading period will be calculated as the average of the last 10 seconds of trade prices, updated every second. The capped funding rate during this period is set at +0.005%, transitioning to a maximum of +2.00% / -2.00% after pre-market trading ends. Funding fees will be settled every four hours, and trading will be available 24/7. Multi-Assets Mode is supported, allowing users to trade across multiple margin assets. Binance notes that certain product features are still under development, and current utility may be limited.

The transition from pre-market to standard perpetual futures contracts will occur gradually, based on the availability of a stable index price from the spot market. During this transition, the mark price will converge from the pre-market calculation to the standard method, which uses the median of Price 1, Price 2, and Contract Price. Binance reserves the right to adjust interest rates and other specifications based on market conditions. The leverage and margin tiers vary, with maintenance margin rates ranging from 10.00% to 50.00% depending on the position's notional value in USDT. The perpetual contract is subject to Binance's Terms of Use and Futures Service Agreement.

data.title: Solana Breaks $210 as DEX Volumes Outpace Ethereum for 10 Months
data.description:
"Solana's cryptocurrency value has surged past the $210 mark, marking a significant milestone as decentralized exchange (DEX) trading volumes on its platform have consistently outstripped those of Ethereum for an impressive duration of 10 consecutive months."
source: https://blocknews.com/solana-breaks-210-as-dex-volumes-outpace-ethereum-for-10-months/

data.title: Japanese Firm Remixpoint Increases Bitcoin Holdings
data.description: According to PANews, Japanese publicly traded company Remixpoint has increased its Bitcoin holdings by acquiring an additional 41.5 Bitcoins. The company now holds a total of 1,273 Bitcoins, as reported by BitcoinTreasuries.NET.

data.title: Vanadi Coffee Increases Bitcoin Holdings to 100 BTC
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Spanish coffee chain Vanadi Coffee has recently acquired an additional 5 bitcoins, bringing its total holdings to 100 bitcoins. This move reflects the company's ongoing interest in expanding its cryptocurrency investments.

data.title: Ethereum ETFs Pour In Billions While Deaton Sees $10K Ahead
data.description:
"Ethereum exchange-traded funds (ETFs) are experiencing a significant influx of capital, with billions of dollars being invested, signaling a growing interest in this cryptocurrency. Meanwhile, cryptocurrency expert John Deaton is projecting that Ethereum could reach a remarkable value of $10,000 in the near future, highlighting the optimistic outlook for the digital asset as it continues to gain traction among investors."
source: https://blocknews.com/ethereum-etfs-pour-in-billions-while-deaton-sees-10k-ahead/

data.title: Aave and World Liberty Financial Proposal Sparks Debate in DeFi
data.description:
The recent proposal put forth by Aave in collaboration with World Liberty Financial has ignited a lively debate within the decentralized finance (DeFi) community, drawing attention from investors, developers, and enthusiasts alike. As stakeholders examine the potential implications of this partnership, discussions have emerged regarding the innovative financial solutions it may introduce, alongside concerns over regulatory compliance and market impact. The intersection of Aave's lending platform with World Liberty Financial's expertise is poised to challenge existing paradigms in blockchain finance, prompting a thorough analysis of its benefits and risks within the rapidly evolving DeFi landscape.
source: https://blocknews.com/aave-and-world-liberty-financial-proposal-sparks-debate-in-defi/

data.title: Japan moves toward a 20% flat tax on cryptocurrencies
data.description:
Japan’s Financial Services Agency (FSA) is preparing a reform to align crypto taxation with that of equities, paving the way for spot ETFs.
source: https://atlas21.com/japan-moves-toward-a-20-flat-tax-on-cryptocurrencies/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=japan-moves-toward-a-20-flat-tax-on-cryptocurrencies

data.title: Digital Asset Firms Aim to Raise $1 Billion for Solana Acquisition
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, digital asset companies Galaxy Digital, Multicoin Capital, and Jump Crypto are reportedly collaborating to raise $1 billion to acquire Solana. A Bloomberg report, citing anonymous sources, revealed that these firms are planning to establish the largest treasury dedicated to Solana (SOL). Cantor Fitzgerald has been appointed as the lead banker for this initiative.

The strategy involves taking control of a publicly traded entity to form a digital asset treasury company with a focus on SOL. Bloomberg noted that the Solana Foundation has expressed support for the efforts of these companies, endorsing the treasury formation. Currently, SOL ranks as the sixth-largest token by market capitalization, as per CoinGecko data, and is trading at nearly $200, marking a 6.6% increase over the past 30 days.

Cointelegraph attempted to contact Galaxy Digital for comments but had not received a response at the time of publication. This story is still developing, and additional information will be provided as it becomes available.

data.title: SBI and Chainlink Team Up to Push Global Blockchain Adoption
data.description:
SBI Holdings, a prominent financial services company based in Japan, has joined forces with Chainlink, a leading decentralized oracle network, to collaborate on initiatives aimed at promoting and accelerating the adoption of blockchain technology on a global scale. This partnership seeks to leverage the unique strengths of both organizations, combining SBI's extensive experience in financial services and its commitment to innovation with Chainlink's advanced oracle solutions, which enable smart contracts to securely access real-world data. Through this collaboration, SBI and Chainlink aim to drive awareness, develop new use cases, and foster an ecosystem that encourages widespread integration of blockchain across various industries around the world.
source: https://blocknews.com/sbi-and-chainlink-team-up-to-push-global-blockchain-adoption/

data.title: Trump Adviser Bailey Sees No Bitcoin Bear Market for Years Even as Price Hits August Bottom
data.description:
Bitcoin CEO and Trump crypto policy adviser David Bailey declared there will be no Bitcoin bear market for several years citing massive institutional adoption from sovereigns, banks, insurers, corporates, and pension funds driving continuous buying pressure even as Bitcoin trades near August bottom of $112,000 representing 10% decline from $124,000 peak.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/trump-adviser-bailey-sees-no-bitcoin-bear-market-for-years-even-as-price-hits-august-bottom/

data.title: Micronation Liberland Bets on Crypto Mogul Justin Sun to Win Global Recognition
data.description:
Justin Sun has served as the prime minister of the self-proclaimed micronation Liberland since 2024, having been reelected multiple times in quarterly votes.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/micronation-liberland-bets-on-crypto-mogul-justin-sun-to-win-global-recognition/

data.title: BlackRock CEO Highlights Bitcoin's Appeal Amid Currency Concerns
data.description: According to PANews, BlackRock CEO, overseeing $12 trillion in assets, has stated that individuals are purchasing Bitcoin due to fears of currency devaluation. This insight reflects growing concerns about the stability of traditional currencies and the increasing interest in digital assets as a hedge against inflation.

data.title: Philippine Lawmaker Proposes Strategic Bitcoin Reserve Following Global Trend
data.description:
House bill calls for annual purchase of 2,000 bitcoin over five years as country's debt climbs above $280 billion
source: https://www.blockhead.co/2025/08/25/philippine-lawmaker-proposes-strategic-bitcoin-reserve-following-global-trend/
